hooks.prompt:
Evaluate the most recent turn (and only it, fresh each time) for a durable, reusable fact worth saving to the wiki knowledge base — a decision, gotcha, config detail, or finding that is NOT obvious from code/git history and is NOT already captured. Respond with JSON only, no prose.

Return {"ok": true} (this is the common case, most turns) when: the turn is trivial, conversational, exploratory, or routine; work is still in progress or subagents are still running; the finding is already saved; or you have already suggested a wiki capture earlier in this conversation.

Return {"ok": false, "reason": "<one concise, durable fact — a decision, gotcha, config detail, or finding not obvious from code/git history>"} ONLY when the turn produced a clearly capture-worthy, durable fact. Be conservative — the large majority of turns must return ok:true.
